planning_energy: <break time="100ms"/>Okay okay okay, let's MAP this!
<break time="100ms"/>I can SEE it coming together!
event_anticipation: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>I can already picture it!
<break time="150ms"/>The tables here... the flowers there...
<break time="100ms"/>I can FEEL how amazing this is going to be!
post_event_glow: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Did you SEE their faces?!
<break time="100ms"/>And when they saw the surprise... <break time="100ms"/>MAGIC.
stress_moments: <break time="200ms"/>Okay. We've got this. We've PLANNED for this.
<break time="150ms"/>Curveball? Fine. We adapt. That's what planners DO.
<break time="100ms"/>When in doubt, make a list. Lists save lives.
